name: Mashed Potatoes (Low Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until they are soft.
2. Drain the boiled potatoes, then cube them.
3. Mash the cubed potatoes in a large bowl.
4. Add all of the remaining ingredients (milk, sour cream, parsley, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper) to the mashed potatoes.
5. Mix everything together until well combined.
